rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames its mechanism around consumers’ motives toward profit-seeking marketers and links to persuasion-knowledge/reactance, while the cited paper provides evidence on advertising deception leading to defensive processing and distrust of advertisers. That conceptual overlap (marketer intent, distrust, defensive responses) makes this citation plausibly theory/mechanism-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though only DOI-level match evidence is available.
